subcodes.first_line: The esteemed Aqa Muhammad Hashim Aqa Mahdi is now present like an unrelenting creditor or a diligent tax collector [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب آقا محمد هاشم آقا مهدی الان چون طلبکار بی امان و یا محصل دیوان حاضر
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
